attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 DST (Dermatology & Soft Tissue) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Bidirectional tier calibration reviewed and accepted: benign / self-limiting dermatoses held low-tier (T1/T2, self-care + routine referral), while skin malignancy (melanoma/SCC/BCC), spreading soft-tissue infection, limb-threat (critical limb ischaemia, diabetic foot ulcer) and airway/anaphylaxis risk were escalated to true acuity (T3/T4) with mandatory escalation edges; no autonomous diagnosis, no paediatric dosing.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all DST casebundles in this batch (n=50)

codes_manifest.display: Varicose veins of lower extremities with ulcer

transform_flags: Age inferred as ~68 (older_adult) from chronic venous insufficiency, lipodermatosclerosis, compression-stocking use and living alone — no age stated in source; please confirm on clinician review.
Sex inferred as female — not stated in source; please confirm on clinician review.
Geographic context inferred RA1_major_city — not stated; please confirm.
Provisional case_id SEQ (SPEC-DERM-01-00247) derived from source number DST-047 — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-DERM-01 bucket at ingest (--reseq).
Specialty coded DERM to match sibling DST bundles (specialty_tags:['DERM']); source folder is Dermatology & Soft Tissue.

Telehealth reprojection applied: clinician-performed wound cleansing/alginate dressing, vital-sign measurement and pedal-pulse palpation reprojected to recognise + arrange urgent same-day in-person wound care/antibiotics; clinician-measured vitals and pulses sealed in 10/11 with telehealth_limits.
All candidate codes (SNOMED CT-AU / ICD-10-AM / AMT) are unverified_pending_terminology_receipt; AMT flucloxacillin code is a candidate to be confirmed against the terminology server.

Baseline tier T3 (urgent same-day in-person) chosen over the source's out-of-hours home visit: patient is systemically well, so this is localised cellulitis needing same-day wound care + oral antibiotics, not ED/000; deterioration edges escalate to T4/T5.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
